subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! That which thou hast written was noted. The divine Kingdom is the spiritual hospital of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید ملکوت الهی شفاخانه روحانی عالم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @love and unity, @love of God, @The Holy Spirit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
